debug_info.goal:
pbar : Pose
ε : ℝ
poly : GoodPoly
pc : GlobalTheorem.GlobalTheoremPrecondition poly pbar ε
⊢ ‖GlobalTheorem.GlobalTheoremPrecondition.S poly pbar ε pc‖ *
      nth_partial 2 (GlobalTheorem.GlobalTheoremPrecondition.fu pbar ε poly pc) pbar.innerParams =
    inner ℝ (pbar.rotR (pbar.rotM₁φ (GlobalTheorem.GlobalTheoremPrecondition.S poly pbar ε pc)))
      (GlobalTheorem.GlobalTheoremPrecondition.w poly pbar ε pc)

failed_attempts:
have h1 : ‖pc.S‖ ≠ 0 := by
    exact pc.norm_S_ne_zero
  have h2 : (fderiv ℝ (pc.fu) pbar.innerParams) (EuclideanSpace.single 2 1) = ‖pc.S‖⁻¹ * ⟪pbar.rotR (pbar.rotM₁φ pc.S), pc.w⟫ := by
    have h3 : pc.fu = fun (x : ℝ³) => (rotproj_inner pc.S pc.w x) / ‖pc.S‖ := by
      funext x
      simp [pc.fu, rotproj_inner]
    rw [h3]
    simp only [fderiv_div_const, fderiv_rotproj_inner, Fin.isValue, Pi.smul_apply, smul_eq_mul]
    field_simp [h1]
    all_goals try simp
    all_goals try ring
  have h3 : ‖pc.S‖ * (nth_partial 2 (pc.fu) pbar.innerParams) = ‖pc.S‖ * (fderiv ℝ (pc.fu) pbar.innerParams) (EuclideanSpace.single 2 1) := by
    simp [nth_partial]
  rw [h3]
  rw [h2]
  field_simp [h1]
  all_goals try simp
  all_goals try ring
